stages.description: small clump of dark green basal rosette leaves just emerging from soil, 10-15cm tall, no stems or flowers
upright plant 40-50cm, rough dark green leaves on stems, flower buds just beginning to form at tips
in full bloom, wide-spreading pink ray petals, prominent domed orange-brown central cone, tall upright stem with rough dark green leaves
petals fallen, large dark spiky seed cones on tall stems, some side branches with spent flowers
low clump of deeply cut hairy blue-green basal leaves, 20-30cm tall, no stems or flowers yet
in full bloom, large bowl-shaped crinkled scarlet-orange petals with black basal blotches, prominent dark stamens, tall hairy stem with deeply cut leaves
large ornamental grey-green pepper-pot seed pods on upright stems, basal foliage yellowing and dying back
young seedling 15-20cm tall, pair of large rounded cotyledons with first rough true leaves emerging
tall plant 80-100cm, stout upright stem with large rough heart-shaped leaves, large flower bud forming at top
in full bloom, large circular flowerhead with bright yellow ray petals surrounding dark brown centre disc, tall stout stem with large rough heart-shaped leaves
dried mature flowerhead full of seeds, outer petals gone, leaves yellowed and drooping, stem browning
low dense clump of grey-green aromatic textured leaves, 15-20cm, no flower spikes yet
tall upright branching spikes densely packed with small violet-blue flowers with purple bracts, grey-green aromatic basal foliage
spent flower spikes with tiny dark seeds, purple bracts faded, grey-green foliage still present below
low mounding clump of large pleated pale green velvety leaves just unfurling, catching dewdrops, no flowers yet
low mounding plant, frothy sprays of tiny lime-chartreuse flowers on branching stems above large scalloped velvety pale green leaves
large scalloped leaves still lush, some browning at edges, spent flower stems fading to straw colour
